<style id='acf-recruit-overview-style-inline-css' type='text/css'>
.block--recruit-overview .swiper .swiper-pagination{position:relative;bottom:auto;top:auto;left:auto;right:auto;width:90%;max-width:1280px;margin:10px auto 0 auto;display:-webkit-box;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;-webkit-box-pack:end;-ms-flex-pack:end;justify-content:flex-end}.block--recruit-overview .swiper .swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet{border-radius:0;background-color:var(--color-black);opacity:0.25;-webkit-transition:width 0.3s ease-in-out;transition:width 0.3s ease-in-out}@media (max-width:700px){.block--recruit-overview .swiper .swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet{width:20px;height:4px}}@media (min-width:701px){.block--recruit-overview .swiper .swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet{width:40px;height:6px}}.block--recruit-overview .swiper .swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet-active{opacity:1}@media (max-width:700px){.block--recruit-overview .swiper .swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet-active{width:60px}}@media (min-width:701px){.block--recruit-overview .swiper .swiper-pagination .swiper-pagination-bullet-active{width:100px}}@media (max-width:700px){.block--recruit-overview .overview{margin:60px auto 80px}}@media (min-width:701px){.block--recruit-overview .overview{text-align:center;margin:60px auto 140px}}.block--recruit-overview .overview .view .label{display:inline-block;margin:0 auto 20px;background-color:var(--color-black);color:var(--color-white);font-weight:bold;line-height:1}@media (max-width:700px){.block--recruit-overview .overview .view .label{font-size:14px;padding:6px 20px}}@media (min-width:701px){.block--recruit-overview .overview .view .label{font-size:22px;padding:8px 46px}}.block--recruit-overview .overview .view .page-title{font-weight:bold;line-height:1.5;color:var(--color-black)}@media (max-width:700px){.block--recruit-overview .overview .view .page-title{font-size:min(7.8vw,40px);margin-bottom:40px}}@media (min-width:701px){.block--recruit-overview .overview .view .page-title{font-size:min(6.6vw,66px);margin-bottom:50px}}.block--recruit-overview .overview .view .description{max-width:980px;margin:0 auto}
</style>

<style id='acf-recruit-benefits-style-inline-css' type='text/css'>
.block--recruit-benefits{background-color:var(--color-recruit-theme);color:var(--color-white)}@media (max-width:700px){.block--recruit-benefits{padding:80px 0}}@media (min-width:701px){.block--recruit-benefits{padding:100px 0}}.block--recruit-benefits .view .block-title{font-weight:bold}@media (max-width:700px){.block--recruit-benefits .view .block-title{font-size:26px;margin-bottom:20px}}@media (min-width:701px){.block--recruit-benefits .view .block-title{font-size:38px;margin-bottom:20px}}.block--recruit-benefits .view .items{display:-ms-grid;display:grid}@media (max-width:700px){.block--recruit-benefits .view .items{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:max(5vw,30px) 3vw}}@media (min-width:701px){.block--recruit-benefits .view .items{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr));gap:40px min(45px,2vw)}}.block--recruit-benefits .view .items .item .benefits-title{line-height:1.6}@media (max-width:700px){.block--recruit-benefits .view .items .item .benefits-title{font-size:18px;margin-bottom:10px}}@media (min-width:701px){.block--recruit-benefits .view .items .item .benefits-title{font-size:22px;margin-bottom:10px}}.block--recruit-benefits .view .items .item .benefits-caption{line-height:2}@media (min-width:701px){.block--recruit-benefits .view .items .item .benefits-caption{font-size:16px}}
</style>
<style id='acf-recruit-env-style-inline-css' type='text/css'>
.acf-block-preview:has(.block--recruit-post--env){padding:60px 0;background-color:#ddd}.acf-block-preview:has(.block--recruit-post--env)>*{display:none}@media (max-width:700px){.block--recruit-post--env{margin:120px 0}}@media (min-width:701px){.block--recruit-post--env{margin:120px 0 200px}}
</style>
<style id='acf-recruit-message-style-inline-css' type='text/css'>
@media (max-width:700px){.block--recruit-message{margin-bottom:80px}}@media (min-width:701px){.block--recruit-message{margin-bottom:200px}}@media (min-width:701px){.block--recruit-message .view .layout{display:-webkit-box;display:-ms-flexbox;display:flex;-webkit-box-pack:center;-ms-flex-pack:center;justify-content:center;gap:min(8vw,120px)}}.block--recruit-message .view .layout .title{font-family:"hiragino-kaku-gothic-pron",sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-style:normal;letter-spacing:0;white-space:nowrap;-webkit-writing-mode:vertical-rl;-ms-writing-mode:tb-rl;writing-mode:vertical-rl;text-orientation:mixed}@media (max-width:700px){.block--recruit-message .view .layout .title{font-size:min(7vw,42px);line-height:1.8;margin:0 auto 60px}}@media (min-width:701px){.block--recruit-message .view .layout .title{font-size:min(6vw,58px);line-height:1.4}}@media (min-width:701px){.block--recruit-message .view .layout .text{margin-top:160px}}
</style>
<style id='acf-company-billboard-style-inline-css' type='text/css'>
@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-billboard{margin:0 0 100px}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-billboard{margin:0 0 120px}}.block--company-billboard .page-title{font-family:"open-sans",sans-serif;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-weight:bold;text-transform:uppercase}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-billboard .page-title{font-size:min(10vw,54px);margin:80px 0}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-billboard .page-title{font-size:min(7.6vw,80px);margin:140px 0}}.block--company-billboard .page-title:before{position:relative;content:"";display:inline-block;background-color:var(--color-text);margin-right:.3em}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-billboard .page-title:before{top:-0.28em;width:1em;height:.13em}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-billboard .page-title:before{top:-0.28em;width:2em;height:.14em}}.block--company-billboard .graphic{width:100vw;margin:0 calc(50% - 50vw)}.block--company-billboard .graphic .image{object-fit:cover}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-billboard .graphic .image{aspect-ratio:390/420}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-billboard .graphic .image{aspect-ratio:1366/770}}

</style>
<style id='acf-company-overview-style-inline-css' type='text/css'>
@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-overview{margin:0 0 140px}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-overview{margin:0 0 120px}}.block--company-overview .block-title{font-weight:bold;text-transform:uppercase}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-overview .block-title{font-size:min(6vw,36px);margin-bottom:40px}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-overview .block-title{font-size:min(5vw,36px);margin-bottom:40px}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-overview .layout{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(440px, 1fr));gap:0 5%}}.block--company-overview .layout .table table{table-layout:fixed;border-collapse:collapse;width:100%;line-height:1.6;border-top:1px solid #d8d8d8}.block--company-overview .layout .table table tr{border-bottom:1px solid #d8d8d8}.block--company-overview .layout .table table tr td,.block--company-overview .layout .table table tr th{text-align:left}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-overview .layout .table table tr td,.block--company-overview .layout .table table tr th{padding:20px 0 22px}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-overview .layout .table table tr td,.block--company-overview .layout .table table tr th{padding:20px 0 22px}}.block--company-overview .layout .table table tr td p,.block--company-overview .layout .table table tr th p{margin:0}.block--company-overview .layout .table table tr td p+p,.block--company-overview .layout .table table tr th p+p{margin-top:1em}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-overview .layout .table table tr th{width:7em}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-overview .layout .table table tr th{width:8em}}

</style>
<style id='acf-company-mvv-style-inline-css' type='text/css'>
.block--company-mvv .graphic{width:100vw;margin:0 calc(50% - 50vw)}.block--company-mvv .graphic .image{object-fit:cover}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-mvv .graphic .image{aspect-ratio:390/420}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-mvv .graphic .image{aspect-ratio:1366/770}}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-mvv .mvv{margin-top:120px}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-mvv .mvv{margin-top:140px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:160px 1fr;gap:0 2%}}.block--company-mvv .mvv .label{font-family:"open-sans",sans-serif;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;line-height:1.4;font-weight:bold;color:#999}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-mvv .mvv .label{font-size:20px;margin-bottom:10px}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-mvv .mvv .label{font-size:26px;margin-top:8px}}.block--company-mvv .mvv .contents .mvv-title{line-height:1.6}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-mvv .mvv .contents .mvv-title{font-size:min(5.4vw,52px);margin-bottom:1em}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-mvv .mvv .contents .mvv-title{font-size:min(3.6vw,52px);margin-bottom:1em}}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-mvv .mvv .contents .mvv-title--mission{font-size:min(6.8vw,52px)}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-mvv .mvv .contents .mvv-title--mission{font-size:min(6vw,72px)}}.block--company-mvv .mvv .contents .mvv-title--mission>p{display:inline-block;white-space:nowrap}.block--company-mvv .mvv .contents .mvv-title--mission>p:first-child{text-indent:-0.5em}.block--company-mvv .mvv .contents .value-title{line-height:1.6}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-mvv .mvv .contents .value-title{font-size:min(5.6vw,52px)}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-mvv .mvv .contents .value-title{font-size:min(3.6vw,52px)}}.block--company-mvv .mvv .contents .value-title:not(:first-child){margin-top:1em}.block--company-mvv .mvv .contents .text{margin-bottom:1em}.block--company-mvv .mission-images{display:none}

</style>
<link rel='stylesheet' id='acf-company-history-style-css' href='https://noden.jp/wp-content/themes/noden_v2.0/blocks/company-history/block.css?ver=6.8.1' type='text/css' media='all' />
<style id='acf-company-qualified-style-inline-css' type='text/css'>
@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-qualified{margin-top:80px}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-qualified{margin-top:120px}}.block--company-qualified .layout{display:grid}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-qualified .layout{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:30px 0}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-qualified .layout{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit, minmax(410px, 1fr));gap:30px 3%}}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-qualified .layout .groups{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:30px 0}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-qualified .layout .groups{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:30px 0}}.block--company-qualified .layout .groups .group{background-color:#f7f7f7}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-qualified .layout .groups .group{border-radius:20px;padding:20px 8vw 30px}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-qualified .layout .groups .group{border-radius:30px;padding:40px 10%}}.block--company-qualified .layout .groups .group .group-title{text-align:center}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-qualified .layout .groups .group .group-title{font-size:18px;margin-bottom:8px}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-qualified .layout .groups .group .group-title{font-size:min(6vw,26px);margin-bottom:.4em}}.block--company-qualified .layout .groups .group .lists .list{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;font-size:.9em;line-height:1.4}.block--company-qualified .layout .groups .group .lists .list:not(:last-child){margin-bottom:.8em}.block--company-qualified .layout .groups .group .lists .list .persons{flex:1;display:flex;align-items:center}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-qualified .layout .groups .group .lists .list .persons{min-width:56px}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-qualified .layout .groups .group .lists .list .persons{min-width:60px}}.block--company-qualified .layout .groups .group .lists .list .persons:before{content:"";height:1px;flex-grow:1;border-bottom:1px dashed #c9c9c9;margin:0 .8em}

</style>
<style id='acf-company-certificates-style-inline-css' type='text/css'>
@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-certificates{margin-top:80px}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-certificates{margin-top:120px}}.block--company-certificates .layout{display:grid}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-certificates .layout{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:30px 0}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-certificates .layout{grid-template-columns:6fr 4fr;gap:0 3%}}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-certificates .layout .contents .block-title{font-size:min(10vw,42px);line-height:1.4}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-certificates .layout .contents .block-title{font-size:min(4vw,42px);line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:.5em}}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-certificates .layout .contents .info{margin-top:30px}}@media(max-width: 700px){.block--company-certificates .layout .contents .info p{line-height:1.6}}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-certificates .layout .contents .info p{line-height:1.6}}.block--company-certificates .layout .contents .info p .label{display:block;font-weight:bold}@media(min-width: 701px){.block--company-certificates .layout .contents .info p .label{font-size:14px}}

</style>
<style id='acf-home-overview-style-inline-css' type='text/css'>
.theme-home .section--overview{background-color:var(--color-theme);color:var(--color-white);overflow:hidden}.theme-home .section--overview .layout{display:grid;align-items:center}.theme-home .section--overview .layout>*{grid-column:1/1;grid-row:1/1}.theme-home .section--overview .layout .background{position:relative;height:100%}.theme-home .section--overview .layout .background p{position:absolute;font-family:"open-sans",sans-serif;font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-weight:bold;line-height:1;text-transform:uppercase;color:#9a0322}@media(max-width: 700px){.theme-home .section--overview .layout .background p{font-size:min(30vw,140px);bottom:-1.1em;left:-0.15em;transform:rotate(-90deg);transform-origin:left top}}@media(min-width: 701px){.theme-home .section--overview .layout .background p{font-size:min(24vw,300px);bottom:-3vw;right:-2vw}}.theme-home .section--overview .layout .view{position:relative}@media(max-width: 700px){.theme-home .section--overview .layout .view{padding:100px 0}}@media(min-width: 701px){.theme-home .section--overview .layout .view{padding:140px 0}}.theme-home .section--overview .layout .view .title{font-weight:bold}@media(max-width: 700px){.theme-home .section--overview .layout .view .title{font-size:min(10vw,26px);line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:40px}}@media(min-width: 701px){.theme-home .section--overview .layout .view .title{font-size:min(6vw,62px);line-height:1.4;margin-bottom:40px}}@media(max-width: 700px){.theme-home .section--overview .layout .view .text{font-size:15px}}@media(min-width: 701px){.theme-home .section--overview .layout .view .text{font-size:22px}}.theme-home .section--overview .layout .view .text:not(:last-child){margin-bottom:1em}

</style>
<style id='acf-home-business-style-inline-css' type='text/css'>
@media(max-width: 700px){.theme-home .section--business{padding:100px 0}}@media(min-width: 701px){.theme-home .section--business{padding:140px 0}}@media(max-width: 700px){.theme-home .section--business .view .business{padding-top:90px}}@media(min-width: 701px){.theme-home .section--business .view .business{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:0 4vw;padding-top:140px}.theme-home .section--business .view .business:nth-child(odd){flex-direction:row-reverse}}.theme-home .section--business .view .business .graphic{overflow:hidden}@media(max-width: 700px){.theme-home .section--business .view .business .graphic{width:100%;border-radius:20px}}@media(min-width: 701px){.theme-home .section--business .view .business .graphic{flex:1;min-width:280px;border-radius:30px}}.theme-home .section--business .view .business .graphic .image{aspect-ratio:789/440;object-fit:cover}@media(min-width: 701px){.theme-home .section--business .view .business .graphic .image{height:440px}}@media(min-width: 701px){.theme-home .section--business .view .business .caption{width:420px}}@media(max-width: 700px){.theme-home .section--business .view .business .caption .caption-title{border-left:1px solid var(--color-text);margin:20px 0 10px;padding:.8em 0 .8em .6em;font-size:min(5vw,36px);line-height:1.4}}@media(min-width: 701px){.theme-home .section--business .view .business .caption .caption-title{border-left:1px solid var(--color-text);margin-bottom:20px;padding:0 0 1.2em .4em;font-size:min(3.8vw,36px);line-height:1.4}}

</style>

<script>
    var scroll = new SmoothScroll('.__scroll', {
        speed: 1000,
        speedAsDuration: true,
        easing: 'easeInOutQuint',
        clip: false,
        offset: 60,
    });

    var closeDrawer = function(e) {
        const header = document.getElementById("header");
        const hamburger = document.getElementById("hamburger");
        const background = document.getElementById("blur-background");

        header.classList.toggle("__active")
        hamburger.classList.toggle("__active")
        background.classList.toggle("__active")
    }
    document.addEventListener('scrollStart', closeDrawer, false);
</script>
